texto: Some people insist on inviting me to their drama buffet... No thanks! My soul hungers for nourishment and growth
autor: it doesn't lust for poison and depletion.
explicacao: Citação de it doesn't lust for poison and depletion. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Some people insist on inviting me to their drama buffet... No thanks! My soul hungers for nourish…” articula reflexao, steve-maraboli, people em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
